title: DesignSystemAndBrandingNarrative
description: Schema enforcing the output format for the Senior UX/UI Design Architect & Brand Strategist pipeline node. Translates structured messaging matrices and psychographic insights into a sophisticated design system.

branding_narrative.description: Synthesized brand narrative capturing sensory atmosphere, interaction principles, and high-level abstract aesthetic direction.

atmosphere.description: Derived from the visual metaphor, core trigger, and hook. Synthesizes the immediate sensory relief, Entry Emotion, and visual transition from pain point to the targeted solution.

ux_philosophy.description: Defines typography intention, motion language, exact scroll rhythm sequences, and details how multiple design styles seamlessly blend without visual noise.

abstract_anchors.description: Cultural, architectural, or environmental high-fidelity references reflecting the dynamic pivot and elevating the brand identity away from generic web clichés.

design_tokens.description: The exact geometric and color tokens mapping the selected design styles into UI execution assets.

color_palette.description: The foundation system color palette translating selected styles into concrete, accessible interfaces.

surface.description: Standard component container surface hex color.

surface_elevated.description: Elevated or hovered element surface hex color.

border.description: Structural line and divider hex color.

text_primary.description: High contrast headline and body text hex color.

text_secondary.description: Sub-headline and supporting description text hex color.

text_muted.description: Disabled states, captions, and fine print text hex color.

accent_primary.description: Dominant action indicator and focal point accent hex color.

accent_secondary.description: Secondary interactive or reinforcing element hex color.

alert.description: Error states, critical thresholds, and panic metric hex color.

success.description: Validated states, optimal targets, and nominal metric hex color.

warning.description: Cautionary thresholds, upcoming system shifts, and intermediary hex color.

shadow.description: Shadow masking and depth simulation hex color.

service_palette.description: Feature-to-token mappings aligning specific capabilities from the input messaging matrix to distinct categorical accents.

feature.description: The specific feature title or service capability description extracted from the messaging matrix mapping.

token.description: Unique mood or utility accent hex color assigned to visually isolate this specific capability.

typography.description: Selected typefaces from the Google Fonts library matching structural tone parameters.

font.description: Exact valid name of the font within the current Google Fonts library.

weights.description: Numerical font weights to be imported for layout hierarchy.

asset_logic.description: Compositional rules, layout boundaries, and generative instructions transforming conceptual styles into frontend structures.

hero_asset_prompt.description: High-fidelity text-to-image prompt capturing the visual metaphor and atmosphere guidelines. Must include concrete environment details, lighting instructions, camera/lens specs, color palette rules, and strict alignment parameters leaving space for layout copy.

structural_anti_patterns.description: Strict structural layout counter-directives preventing generic layout configurations and maintaining custom layout integrity.

micro_interactions.description: Specific animation parameters, state behaviors, and interface motion rules that reinforce contextual utility.
